Welcome to your Holiday Home in Tenerife Island

This lovely duplex offers breathtaking ocean and pool views, providing a truly mesmerizing backdrop for your vacation. Situated in a great location, this apartment is designed to ensure that you have an unforgettable experience.

About the views

Seaside Serenity: A Coastal Haven with Astonishing Views

As you step inside, you’ll be greeted by a warm and inviting atmosphere. The interior is tastefully decorated, creating a cozy and comfortable ambiance throughout. The duplex layout provides ample space, allowing you to relax and unwind in style.

One of the highlights of this apartment is its stunning views. Whether you’re enjoying your morning coffee or savoring a glass of wine in the evening, the panoramic views of the ocean and pool will leave you in awe. In a sunny and clear day, you’ll appreciate La Gomera Island in the horizon and if you look on the right side you’ll see the highest point of Spanish soil which is the Teide Volcanic Peak. During winter, it is usually covered with snow.The apartment is also strategically positioned to be the perfect spot for both sunset and sunrise, offering you a front-row seat to nature’s most captivating displays.

  • Atlantic Ocean View
  • Heated Pool View
  • Teide Volcanic Peak View
  • La Gomera Island View

What WE Can offer

A House of Indispensable Spaces and Amenities

Living Room

The living area is warm and homey, providing an ideal space for relaxation and entertainment.

Kitchen

The kitchen is fully equipped, allowing you to prepare your own meals whenever you desire.

Main Bedroom

With its king size bed and carefully chosen furnishings, this room is designed to provide a serene and rejuvenating experience.

Outdoor Space

Take a look into the charming terrace where comfort meets tranquility.

Bathroom

Step into the modern bathroom with its sleek lines and thoughtful details.

Second Bedroom Space

Perfect for accommodating additional guests or creating a peaceful retreat for family members or friends.

location

Everything Within Reach

The apartment’s location is truly unbeatable. Situated in a great neighborhood, you’ll find yourself within close proximity to popular attractions, restaurants, and shops. Whether you’re seeking a vibrant nightlife scene or a peaceful beach getaway, everything you desire is just a short distance away.

Beaches

Playa de las Américas, 350m - Playa del Camisón, 1km - Playa de las Vistas, 1.3km

Water Parks

Siam Park, 1.5km - Aqualand Costa Adeje, 2.3km

Port of Los Cristianos

With connection to La Gomera & La Palma Islands, 2.7km

Restaurants & Shopping Malls

All along the seaside & "La Milla de Oro" in Avenida de Las Américas, 500m

Hospital

Hospital Universitario Hospiten Sur, 1.3km

Airport

Tenerife South (TFS), 16km

faq

Frequently Asked Questions

What transport options are there near Parque Santiago II?

The nearest bus stop is 200m away. There is also a taxi stop 50m away and a rental car company in front of the apartments.

Where to park the car near the apartment?

There is a small parking lot just in front of the lobby called Parking Tobaiba. If it's full, there is a bigger one in front of Playa de Las Américas, next to McDonald's.

Is the entrance to the pool free?

Absolutely! Nonetheless, there are fees for material use everyday day: sunbeds = 3,50€, parasol = 1,50€, mattress for the sunbed = 1,50€.

Any recommendations of where to have lunch or dinner?

Restaurante Vilaflor is a good option, we find a wide variety of food. It's located along the seaside, at 500m from the apartments. They usually play live music. Metropolis Café is a good option too, tasty burgers and salads. Also La Ola Surf Bar thas really nice breakfast or lunch options. One of my favs. A little bit more expensive is Besame Mucho (but delicious fish) next to the Monkey Beach Club (good cocktails). 

Clients Feedback

Some of the 50 clients' feedback

We absolutely loved everything about the apartment itself, the location is perfect everything literally on your door step , we’ve stayed in Tenerife many times in different hotels but after this we will always try book this apartment as a first option. Anna herself was brilliant, we had a late arrival and she wouldn’t not go asleep until she knew we were inside and happy. 10 out of 10

Paul From United Kingdom

Anna’s apartment is just the best place to stay, great location, views and comfort. Everything you need for a fabulous holiday. We will definitely be back. Thanks again Anna, you were always available with any little question we had.

Claire From Ireland

What a fantastic place!!! Beautiful apartment, heated pool, amazing view and great location. Anna was fantastic and on standby to help when we got a-bit lost, such an attentive host. 100% book this apartment you won’t be disappointed.

Jasmine From United Kingdom

Tutto perfetto ! Location e appartamento meraviglioso

Lucio From Italy

We visit Tenerife several times a year and we thoroughly enjoyed staying at this apartment. The apartment itself was spotless and peaceful and a short walking distance to all the popular restaurants and bars. Anna was fantastic with her communications and responded immediately with any questions we had. We would highly recommend staying here.

Elisabeth Anne From United Kingdom

Anna was so nice and kind from the beggining till the leaving. The explanation was helful always. The accommodation is clean and better than other expensive resorts. Especially good for family. Will definitley come back if I have a chance later.

Sangwoo From United Kingdom

Consultation

Request Availability

We understand that your time is valuable, and that’s why we’ve made it easier than ever to check our availability in just a few simple steps. You can check for your desired dates on our calendar, and if they are available fill out the form. I’ll contact you ASAP to carry out the reservation. Remember that on the top of the web page you’ll find my phone number in case you have any doubts or you want more specific information.
